channel.title: GitHub CAP CDS Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of CAP CDS in GitHub

item.title: SAP-samples/fiori-elements-feature-showcase
item.description: Sample application that demonstrates and documents a broad variety of features of SAP Fiori elements for OData V4. Developers can play around with the new features and learn how to implement them.

item.title: SAP-samples/cap-sflight
item.description: Using SAP Cloud Application Programming Model and SAP Fiori elements to build a simple travel management app, both with Node.js and Java.
